name_he: הנחיות היועצת המשפטית לממשלה
name_en: Attorney General Guidelines Database
historical_coverage: Guidelines from 1968 onward (renumbered series); consolidated current versions
robots_policy: gov.il WAF blocks non-browser agents (HTTP 403) on many paths; robots.txt not the binding constraint
terms_status: State of Israel copyright; free to view, reuse terms not explicitly licensed
recommended_ingestion: Headless browser or gov.il dynamic-collector JSON endpoint; PDFs from gov.il BlobFolder
example_documents: Guideline 1.0000 series; PDF files under www.gov.il/BlobFolder/dynamiccollectorresultitem/
notes: Direct fetch returned HTTP 403 twice (WAF). URL confirmed via multiple search results (July 2026). Alternative rfa.justice.gov.il SearchPredefinedApi (JSON API used by old justice.gov.il) did not resolve from this environment. gov.il WAF (F5/Akamai-type) returns 403 to non-browser fetchers on many paths (esp. /dynamiccollectors/); content is JS-rendered SPA. Browser or headless-browser ingestion required, or the underlying gov.il JSON API used by the SPA.

notes: Web UI is a JS shell to fetchers but the CKAN API responds normally - the only fully machine-readable government channel found. Use it for structured registries complementing document-based guidance.
